message:
test: results-surface regression suite — score tiers, selection style, arrow nav, perf gate (2dccg.9.5)

Adds 4 targeted tests completing results-surface regression coverage:
score_style threshold routing (HIGH/MID/LOW at 8.0/5.0 boundaries),
selected row distinct from default style across themes, arrow key
single-step navigation with boundary clamping, and a meta-test
verifying 3-density render cycle completes under 1s headless.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
